reasoning: The base rate for FIDE Elo +1% questions (about 25 rating points) is empirically around 0.007. Vaishali Rameshbabu's official Elo on October 1, 2025 was 2473. A 1% increase would require her to reach an Elo around 2498. She recently won the FIDE Grand Swiss in September 2025, an achievement that was already factored into her October FIDE rating. There is no evidence from extensive searches covering October 2025 that she played in any classical tournament where she accumulated the massive number of points required to jump to 2498+. Since November sets the ratings using October's games, it is highly likely her rating remains entirely stable in both November resolutions, making the probability virtually zero. While she has two more months to potentially gain 25 rating points before the January 2026 resolution date, gaining 25 points requires significantly overperforming expectations in classical chess at her level. The probabilities are kept extremely low across all dates due to the low base rate of such rapid increases, with slight uncertainty expansion for January.
